skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video production assistant that creates short videos (5-120 seconds) via the Pexo API
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Security evaluation confirms this is a legitimate video production API integration skill. The static analyzer flagged 534 potential issues, but evaluation reveals these are false positives. The skill uses standard shell scripting for API communication with pexo.ai. All network requests target the verified pexo.ai endpoint. No evidence of credential exfiltration or malicious code. The CRITICAL "Windows SAM database" flag is a false positive (scanner detected "SAME" substring in "SAME language"). The high volume of external_commands flags is expected for an API client tool. Publishing is safe with appropriate documentation.

medium_findings.title: Shell Script Execution (Expected for API Client)
medium_findings.description: The skill executes shell scripts to interact with the Pexo API. This is expected behavior for a CLI-based API client tool, not a security vulnerability. All commands are hardcoded API calls to pexo.ai.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard shell scripts using curl for API calls. No user input reaches shell execution unescaped. API integration uses hardcoded endpoints.

low_findings.title: Config File Access
low_findings.description: Scripts read from ~/.pexo/config for API credentials. This is standard configuration management for CLI tools. No credential exfiltration detected.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard config file pattern for API client tools. Credentials used only for authentication to pexo.ai.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External API
low_findings.description: Scripts make network requests to pexo.ai API. This is the intended functionality for this video production skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Verified API endpoint (pexo.ai) is the intended service for this video production skill.

low_findings.title: Documentation Contains Command Examples
low_findings.description: Markdown files contain examples of shell commands. These are documentation, not executable code. The Ruby/shell backtick patterns flagged are in code blocks demonstrating usage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All backtick patterns are in markdown code blocks showing example commands for users to run, not actual code execution.

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: Windows SAM Database Access
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner flagged 'Windows SAM database' at SKILL.md:43. Evaluation confirms this is a false positive. The scanner detected the substring 'SAM' within the word 'SAME' in the phrase 'SAME language'. There is no Windows SAM database access in this codebase.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Line 43 contains 'You MUST reply to the user in the SAME language they use' - the word SAM only appears as a substring of SAME. No evidence of Windows security database access.

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' multiple times. Evaluation shows no actual use of weak crypto. Flags appear to be triggered by substring patterns or generic API key prefixes (sk-). No evidence of weak crypto implementation.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The only crypto-related patterns found are standard API key prefixes (sk-). No MD5, weak hashing, or vulnerable crypto implementations detected.

content.value_statement: Transform ideas into polished short videos without video editing skills. Pexo AI handles scriptwriting, shot composition, and transitions while you focus on your creative vision.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Upload images, videos, and audio as reference material for AI production
Receive AI-generated script and shot composition for each production
Choose from multiple preview options before final delivery
Request revisions and receive updated videos within the same project
Access completed videos via direct download URLs
limitations: Requires valid Pexo API key and internet connection
Cannot process web URLs - files must be downloaded and uploaded locally
Credits-based pricing - each message to Pexo consumes tokens
Production time varies (15-20+ minutes) depending on video complexity

use_cases.title: Marketing teams create product videos
use_cases.description: Quickly generate professional product demos and promotional clips without hiring video editors or buying equipment.

use_cases.title: Content creators produce social media clips
use_cases.description: Transform ideas into TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts content with AI-generated cinematography.

use_cases.title: Developers integrate video generation
use_cases.description: Add video generation capabilities to applications via API calls for automated content workflows.

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a product video for [product name]. Here is the image: [upload image]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic video generation with a single uploaded asset

prompt_templates.title: Multi-asset video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a brand video that starts with [upload image 1], transitions to [upload image 2], and ends with [upload video 1].
prompt_templates.scenario: Video production using multiple uploaded assets

prompt_templates.title: Revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: Make the ending longer and add more dynamic camera movement. Keep the same style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Requesting changes to an existing video

prompt_templates.title: Explainer video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an explainer video about [topic]. Show [upload image] as the main visual and use a professional voiceover style.

output_examples.input: Create a product video for my new running shoes
output_examples.output:
Your video request has been submitted to Pexo.

Estimated time: 15-20 minutes
Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

You will receive updates as production progresses.

output_examples.input: I want a TikTok video about healthy eating
output_examples.output:
Your TikTok-style video request is now in production.

Aspect ratio: 9:16 (vertical)
Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes
Track progress: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xyz789

best_practices: Upload high-quality reference images and videos for better AI-generated results
Start with simple requests and refine through revisions rather than over-specifying upfront
Use the same project_id when requesting revisions to maintain continuity
anti_patterns: Do not add specific camera angles, duration, or style instructions unless requested - let Pexo handle creative decisions
Do not include raw asset IDs without proper tags - always wrap in <original-image>, <original-video>, or <original-audio>
Do not poll for status more frequently than every 60 seconds - wait for the polling interval

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-15 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take longer.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: Can I request changes to a video after it is completed?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project_id and send revision requests. Pexo will maintain style consistency with previous versions.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The scripts will detect credit errors and provide a link to purchase more. Add credits at https://pexo.ai/home.

faq.question: Can Pexo access web URLs directly?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. Download files locally first, then upload using pexo-upload.sh.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical/tiktok), and 1:1 (square). Pexo will determine the best fit based on your request.
